title: Book reviews
abstract: Books reviewed in this article: Aldridge, Alan Religion in the Contemporary World: A Sociological Introduction Diamond, Ian and Jefferies, Julie Beginning Statistics: An Introduction for Social Scientists Girling, Evi, Loader, Ian and Sparks, Richard Crime and Social Change in Middle England: Questions of Order in an English Town Houtkoop‐Steenstra, Hanneke Interaction and the Standardized Survey Interview: The Living Questionnaire Lee, Raymond M. Unobtrusive Methods in Social Research Marquand, David and Nettler, Ronald L. (eds) Religion and Democracy Ann Oakley, Experiments in Knowing: Gender and Method in the Social Sciences Smaje, Chris Natural Hierarchies: The Historical Sociology of Race and Caste Wilson, William Julius The Bridge Over the Racial Divide: Rising Inequality and Coalition Politics
